ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number (EIN) of the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the organization */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Registration date of the organization */,
  "organization_size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ein")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "application_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the application type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  "parent_affiliation" TEXT /* Parent affiliation (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "sub_classification" TEXT /* Sub-classification (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the use case */,
  "specific_requirement" TEXT /* Specific requirement for the use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_status" TEXT /* Next status in the workflow (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number (EIN) of the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the organization */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the organization */,
  "use_case" TEXT /* Use case for the funding */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "income_amount" INTEGER /* Income amount of the organization */,
  "special_considerations" TEXT /* Special considerations for the application */,
  "ask_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of funding requested */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the application was successful */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "grant_amount" INTEGER /* Grant amount awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_ein FOREIGN KEY ("ein") REFERENCES organizations ("ein"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_classification FOREIGN KEY ("classification") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_income_amount FOREIGN KEY ("income_amount") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_application_type FOREIGN KEY ("application_type") REFERENCES application_types ("application_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_use_case FOREIGN KEY ("use_case") REFERENCES use_cases ("use_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Applications table */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, etc.) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the Organizations table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Applications table */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Reviewers table */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reviewer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
